content.query:
SELECT 
COUNTRY,
ROUND(SUM(REVENUE_USD), 2)AS TOTALE_REVENUE
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK'https://aniket001.dfs.core.windows.net/synapse-container/apple_global_sales_dataset.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
)AS [RESULT]
GROUP BY COUNTRY
ORDER BY COUNTRY ASC;

CREATE VIEW APPLE_REVENUE AS
SELECT COUNTRY,ROUND(SUM(REVENUE_USD), 2)AS TOTALE_REVENUE
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK'https://aniket001.dfs.core.windows.net/synapse-container/apple_global_sales_dataset.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
)AS [RESULT]
GROUP BY COUNTRY;

SELECT * FROM APPLE_REVENUE;

CREATE VIEW APPLE_REVENUE_TOP_RANKED AS
WITH TOP_RANKED AS (
SELECT 
COUNTRY,
ROUND(SUM(REVENUE_USD), 2)AS TOTALE_REVENUE,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY SUM(REVENUE_USD) DESC) AS RN 
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK'https://aniket001.dfs.core.windows.net/synapse-container/apple_global_sales_dataset.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
)AS [RESULT]
GROUP BY COUNTRY
)
SELECT
COUNTRY,
TOTALE_REVENUE
FROM TOP_RANKED
WHERE RN < 11;

SELECT * FROM APPLE_REVENUE_TOP_RANKED;



CREATE VIEW PLAYER_CLUBS AS
SELECT
 PLAYER.PLAYER_ID,
 PLAYER.[NAME] AS PLAYER_NAME,
 PLAYER.COUNTRY_OF_BIRTH,
 PLAYER.COUNTRY_OF_CITIZENSHIP,
 CLUBS.*
 FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK'https://aniket001.dfs.core.windows.net/synapse-container/players.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
)AS PLAYER
INNER JOIN OPENROWSET(
    BULK'https://aniket001.dfs.core.windows.net/synapse-container/clubs.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
)AS CLUBS
ON PLAYER.current_club_id = CLUBS.club_id;


select * from PLAYER_CLUBS;

--OpenRowSet

SELECT
* 
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK'https://aniket001.dfs.core.windows.net/synapse-container/tallest_people_in_the_world.csv',
    FORMAT='CSV',
    HEADER_ROW=TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION='2.0'
) AS OPS;

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_file_formats WHERE name = 'SynapseDelimitedTextFormat') 
	CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT [SynapseDelimitedTextFormat] 
	WITH ( FORMAT_TYPE = DELIMITEDTEXT ,
	       FORMAT_OPTIONS (
			 FIELD_TERMINATOR = ',',
			 FIRST_ROW = 11,
			 USE_TYPE_DEFAULT = FALSE
			))
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_data_sources WHERE name = 'synapse-container_aniket001_dfs_core_windows_net') 
	CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE [synapse-container_aniket001_dfs_core_windows_net] 
	WITH (
		LOCATION = 'abfss://synapse-container@aniket001.dfs.core.windows.net' 
	)
GO

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.GiantPeople (
	[id] bigint,
	[name] nvarchar(4000),
	[gender] nvarchar(4000),
	[country] nvarchar(4000),
	[continent] nvarchar(4000),
	[height_cm] bigint,
	[height_ft_in] nvarchar(4000),
	[weight_kg] bigint,
	[birth_year] bigint,
	[death_year] bigint,
	[lifespan] bigint,
	[occupation] nvarchar(4000),
	[medical_condition] nvarchar(4000),
	[is_alive] bigint
	)
	WITH (
	LOCATION = 'tallest_people_in_the_world.csv',
	DATA_SOURCE = [synapse-container_aniket001_dfs_core_windows_net],
	FILE_FORMAT = [SynapseDelimitedTextFormat]
	)
GO


SELECT TOP 100 * FROM dbo.GiantPeople
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_file_formats WHERE name = 'SynapseParquetFormat') 
	CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT [SynapseParquetFormat] 
	WITH ( FORMAT_TYPE = PARQUET)
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_data_sources WHERE name = 'synapse-container_aniket001_dfs_core_windows_net') 
	CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE [synapse-container_aniket001_dfs_core_windows_net] 
	WITH (
		LOCATION = 'abfss://synapse-container@aniket001.dfs.core.windows.net' 
	)
GO

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.sample_prq (
	[StudentID] nvarchar(4000),
	[Name] nvarchar(4000),
	[Age] bigint,
	[EducationLevel] nvarchar(4000),
	[EnrollmentDate] nvarchar(4000),
	[GraduationDate] nvarchar(4000),
	[Institution] nvarchar(4000)
	)
	WITH (
	LOCATION = 'sample3.parquet',
	DATA_SOURCE = [synapse-container_aniket001_dfs_core_windows_net],
	FILE_FORMAT = [SynapseParquetFormat]
	)
GO


SELECT TOP 100 * FROM dbo.sample_prq
GO
